movies.overview: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.
movies.title: Enola Holmes 3

movies.overview: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
movies.tagline: Sometimes the universe leaves you a message.
movies.title: Voicemails for Isabelle

movies.overview: Former CIA Operative James Dial is coaxed back into action to kill a terrorist in London, but it all goes wrong and he is forced into hiding, where he meets and befriends a 12 year old girl.
movies.tagline: The world's greatest marksman is now a marked man.
movies.title: The Contractor

movies.overview: A story about a seemingly unlikely couple who cross paths under life-threatening circumstances as though they are destined not only to meet but to save each other's lives. Not once, but twice.
movies.tagline: The deeper you look, the more you will find.
movies.title: Angel Eyes

movies.overview: A tightly wound realtor's picture-perfect life gets an extreme makeover when his lovably chaotic "little brother" suddenly reappears.
movies.title: Little Brother

movies.overview: Chaos reigns at the natural history museum when night watchman Larry Daley accidentally stirs up an ancient curse, awakening Attila the Hun, an army of gladiators, a Tyrannosaurus rex and other exhibits.
movies.title: Night at the Museum

movies.overview: France, 1963. Since she was a child, Natacha has dreamed of freedom and adventure. Her dream has a name: air hostess. She admires the women who fly the world, with no ties, no husbands, and no cooking to do. Despite all her efforts Natacha does not match the walking fantasy that an air hostess is supposed to embody at the time. She's too... or not enough... whatever it is, she hasn't got it!
movies.tagline: Based on the Belgian comics series, created by François Walthéry and Gos.
movies.title: Natacha, (Almost) Air Hostess

movies.overview: When a former elite sniper is hunted down by the ruthless warlord who once held her captive, she must fight to the death to protect the daughter she has raised in hiding, on a remote Australian farm.
movies.tagline: She escaped her past. It hunted her down.
movies.title: Seven Snipers

movies.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.
movies.tagline: They sing. They dance. They battle demons.
movies.title: KPop Demon Hunters

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 8
last_episode_to_air.overview: With an unlikely ally at their side, David and Rachel have one chance to rescue Matthew from his captors — before he slips away for good.

tv_shows.name: I Will Find You
tv_shows.overview: Wrongfully imprisoned for murdering his own son, a father sets out on a desperate rescue mission after learning the boy may still be alive.
tv_shows.tagline: Find the boy. Find the truth.

last_episode_to_air.name: Something Broken
last_episode_to_air.overview: Torn across the city as the Fire Nation closes in, the team must reunite to save Ba Sing Se — and Zuko must decide where his real loyalties lie.

tv_shows.name: Avatar: The Last Airbender
tv_shows.overview: A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war — and fight a ruthless enemy bent on stopping him.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 8
last_episode_to_air.overview: With the truth just out of reach and their suspicions pointing to a larger scandal, Helena and Dani risk everything to find Celia — no matter the cost.

tv_shows.name: Oasis
tv_shows.overview: Oasis is the most luxurious holiday resort in the country — a paradise reserved for the wealthiest families, featuring private beaches, VIP facilities, and impenetrable security. The perfect place to spend the best summer of your life. But everything falls apart when the police storm the resort to investigate a mysterious disappearance. In such an exclusive place, everyone is a suspect — and no one can leave until the culprit is found.
tv_shows.tagline: There are summers that change everything. And places designed to escape—even from the truth.

tv_shows.name: Salish & Jordan Matter
tv_shows.overview: Follow father and daughter Jordan and Salish through wild situations and extreme challenges in this compilation of classic family moments.

last_episode_to_air.name: The Executor
last_episode_to_air.overview: When Charles' neighbors report him missing, suspicion falls on Caroline, who claims to be managing his estate — but is instead concealing a grisly crime.

tv_shows.name: Worst Neighbor Ever
tv_shows.overview: This intense documentary series details true stories of neighbors gone bad, from heinous fraud schemes to senseless acts of violent retribution.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 6
last_episode_to_air.overview: Min-ji finds herself in a dire situation — until special agent Jung Sang-a shows up. The Special Missions Directorate tries to lure out Manager Kim.

tv_shows.name: Agent Kim Reactivated
tv_shows.overview: When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.

tv_shows.name: Another Self
tv_shows.overview: Three friends arrive in a seaside town, where they connect with their spiritual selves and suddenly face unresolved trauma from their families' pasts.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 10
last_episode_to_air.overview: After public backlash hits the bureau, Hwa-jin and his team go rogue to expose a deadly conspiracy led by a violent student-run gang.

tv_shows.name: Teach You a Lesson
tv_shows.overview: An inspector from the Educational Rights Protection Bureau (ERPB) who is authorized by the government to use physical intervention and unconventional methods to discipline delinquent students and reform the educational system.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: The National Assembly and the Minister of Education passes the Amendment to the Act on the Protection of Teachers' Rights. With the passage of the law, a new government organization, the Educational Rights Protection Bureau, is formed. Na Hwa-jin belongs to the Educational Rights Protection Bureau. He is sent to a problem school as a supervisor. There, he can educate the students without any restrictions or limitations.

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 22
last_episode_to_air.overview: Competition between the wives continues beyond the grave as Essie and Joyce clash over how to memorialize Jonasi.

tv_shows.name: The Polygamist
tv_shows.overview: Social media darling, Joyce, is the picture of marital perfection — until her cheating husband's conquests ignite a scandalous emotional meltdown.
tv_shows.tagline: He chose betrayal, she chose revenge.
